arts.ttl: Chelsea must finish in top four - Colwill
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Levi Colwill talks about giving back to his boyhood club Sholing FC where he has invested financially, his aims for Chelsea this season, and playing for England.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Maresca 'light years' ahead - Colwill
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Levi Colwill says manager Enzo Maresca is "light years above everyone else" in the way he thinks about football.

arts.ttl: Chelsea get biggest Kobbie Mainoo transfer hint yet as Man United exit stance emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United star Kobbie Mainoo plans to turn down a contract extension offer, according to a new report. According to reports from The Guardian, with Mainoo minded to reject the offer of a new contract from United, he plans to seek a move overseas.

arts.ttl: Chelsea questions need to be asked over Colwill as tough Maresca decision looms
arts.sum: Colwill has completed the full 90 minutes in all but two Premier League games this season - one of them where he was rested at Southampton and the other one, the victory over Wolves in January, he was missing with a minor knock. Next time out at Brighton in the league, Colwill had an altercation with Danny Welbeck that left the Chelsea defender on the floor.
